theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 68점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 51 / 중기 73 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 정상
overheat.guidance: 진입 OK. 종합 점수가 좋다면 매수 검토.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 6.0% → 2-ATR 손절폭 12.0%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 4개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, 일봉 200MA, 일봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +6.4% 위치. T1 $450.6 (R:R 2.1)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $373.9 아래 손절가 $336.9 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Pakistan Says Strikes Kill 29 Afghans in New Border Flare Up
top_news.summary: Pakistan said it carried out a ground operation and air strikes along its border with Afghanistan on Sunday and Monday, killing 29 militants in response to earlier attacks and marking the biggest flare-up in cross-border violence in weeks.

top_news.title: Forgent, Backer Offer Stock After Price Doubles Since IPO
top_news.summary: Forgent Power Solutions Inc. and its private equity backer Neos Partners LP are offering to sell about 35 million shares, marking the third stock sale since the power distribution equipment maker went public in February.

top_news.title: CEO Behind Knicks Flyfish Club Afterparty on What’s Next
top_news.summary: David Rodolitz, Founder and CEO of VCR Group, joined the live broadcast to discuss the recent celebration held by the New York Knicks at the Flyfish Club following their NBA Finals victory. As the owner of the Flyfish Club, Rodolitz shared insights on the significance of hosting such a high-profile event, emphasizing the value of the extensive press coverage generated. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Grasshopper Club Zurich Sold by LA Team to Bridge Football
top_news.summary: Bridge Football Group has bought Grasshopper Club Zurich, one of Switzerland’s most storied football teams.

top_news.title: Novelist Teddy Wayne Explores Themes of Power and Marriage Dynamics in 'The Au Pair'
top_news.summary: Teddy Wayne, author of new novel 'The Au Pair,' said that he wanted to explore marriage dynamics and the way that his male main character reacts to his lack of success and feelings of emasculation as his wife becomes the breadwinner in their family.  Wayne, who originally intended the book as short, adaptable screenplay, also discussed the literary landscape and his writing process.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Comcast to Spinoff NBCUniversal & Sky | Closing Bell
top_news.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Nasdaq 100 Jumps More Than 2% as Dip Buyers Lift Tech Stocks
top_news.summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.

top_news.title: Susquehanna Says It Lost Millions to Mystery Insider Traders
top_news.summary: Susquehanna Investment Group is attempting to unmask the identities of individuals it claims made at least $100 million trading on inside information about a Chinese government crackdown on cross-border brokerages last month.

top_news.title: US Stocks Get Tech Boost After AI-Fueled Selloff: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A rally in several technology giants lifted stocks as the recent artificial-intelligence selloff lured buyers betting the industry’s investment boom will continue to support solid corporate earnings.

top_news.title: Yen Hits 40-Year Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled Japan
top_news.summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.
